defaults.ptx_feature: PTX ISA 8.7 minimum; CUDA 13.3 emits PTX 9.3

stages.representation: convergent ordered kind::f8f6f4 packed-F16 inline PTX in public C, A, B, metadata, selector order
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 libNVVM retained the exact 25-form matrix in 8,886-byte PTX (SHA-256 fe613b565fd6028eaaff9b7df078c93af5b47163f19a9685a43bd6dee28fea6d), produced 11,504-byte LTOIR (SHA-256 aac8c70c26474ccd692e45a453d9f7236c8e040d66dd47047b582524d9deff4c), and emitted no unresolved llvm.nvvm calls or extern declarations.

CUDA 13.3 ptxas produced a 9,728-byte cubin (SHA-256 560446ab6b41e45ca208fddc2c1439d9e851b1b67a9de920e6e81026863352b2) retaining all 25 unique QMMA forms; the 27,724-byte SASS dump has SHA-256 3c27689195cd558cd3df06db75ba6e46b1905d39e636536c0a52e01ba3323270.
